About Swan Signature

A Notary You Can Count On
When It Matters Most

Swan Signature Notary Services was founded to fill a real gap — someone your neighbors can actually trust in their most stressful moments. Closing on a home, navigating an estate document, or signing papers from a hospital bed: we show up for all of it.

Rooted in Lakeland for 21 years. Married, two kids, proud band mom and scout leader. This is a full-time commitment — not a side hustle.

— Lakeland's trusted notary
[ Photo Placeholder ]
What We Do

Professional Notary
Services for Every Need

From simple document notarizations to complex real estate closings and international apostilles — Swan Signature handles it all with accuracy, care, and full professionalism.

01
General Notary Work
Documents, affidavits, powers of attorney, healthcare surrogates, and more.
02
Real Estate & Loan Signing
Certified Loan Signing Agent partnering with title companies and attorneys.
03
Apostille Services
State and federal apostille facilitation for international document use.
04
Remote Online Notary
Approved Florida RON — notarize securely from anywhere in the world.

Ready to Book?

Schedule online in minutes. Evening, weekend, and holiday appointments available. We'll come to you.

Service Area

Serving West Central Florida

Primary coverage across five counties. Travel outside region available with additional fee. As an approved Remote Online Notary, clients can be located anywhere in the world.

Remote Online Notary (RON) — Available to clients anywhere in the world via secure, compliant platform.
